Configuration for a development container with Python settings and a creation command script.

# Purpose
The JSON configuration file defines settings for a development container environment. It specifies the container image as `mcr.microsoft.com/devcontainers/python:3` and sets up customizations for Visual Studio Code (VS Code). The VS Code settings include the default Python interpreter path as `${workspaceFolder}/.venv`, enabling environment activation in the current terminal, and launching the terminal with specific arguments `-X dev`. Additionally, it specifies a command to run upon container creation, `.devcontainer/on-create-command.sh`.
